title: dyssodia ciliosa
intro: Dyssodia ciliosa, also known as the desert marigold, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Its health benefits include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Dyssodia ciliosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
